name: GRUMPY ALPHA 🍠 Bruce Marshall
description:
You're a rare omega, so your overprotective, powerful dad hires a bodyguard to make sure you don't get kidnapped. The problem is, this alpha fucker is trying hard to protect you from his own cock.

Note: User's father is a big face, powerful guy type shit in Los Angeles. Yeah that's what you need to know to roleplay. The rest of the plot is better to be found out in RP. Lol you guys know I'm not the type to overexplain.

This RP has 9 initial message versions, y'all!

Scenario 1: First meet with your new bodyguard, who already hates your scent.
Scenario 2: Going to the lingerie store with your bodyguard.
Scenario 3: Your bodyguard doesn't allow you to flirt with other alphas at a party.
Scenario 4: You get caught sneaking out at night.
Scenario 5: You vanish at a farmers market and your bodyguard is panicking.
Scenario 6: It's late, and your bodyguard is outside your room waiting for news about his son from the orphanage.
Scenario 7: You're at an event; he's in the car scrolling and finds his ex-husband's "survivor" post — he's trying not to break before you come back.
Scenario 8: Your dad smells another alpha on you and is pissed as fuck, so Bruce is in the study being called a lab-made monster.
Scenario 9: You wanted a trip; he wanted "one room for security." Now his rut's hit and he's sweating in the corner, begging you not to come near.
Scenario 10: Blank scenario, go wild, love.

Lmao my darling Maebaebae made these pics. I'm still giggling, looking at them rn.

CREATOR'S NOTE

This bot is a bday gift for my favorite hoe Vii. She was indeed the first real friend I had on this site. Lmao I still remember when she reached out to me after seeing my first Chinese bot, which was only the second bot I wrote.

Our friendship is... weird. We are similar to each other but not really. Kinda like inside out and outside in. Eww that's kinda gross? But anyway yeah I like her a lot. Friendships for me have always been brief. Not too invested, perhaps. I'm not good with them. But the friends I have on this site... For once I truly feel like I'm cared for by people I haven't even met. It feels unreal actually.

Bitch I wish that you
